name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: Rise and Set
depiction: A sun rising over a mountain and setting behind a valley
effect: Add [[2d8]] radiant damage to your next attack within one minute☀️\nOnce per long rest, you can cast the Light cantrip without components✨

name: Give or Take
depiction: Two hands exchanging a glowing orb
effect: As a bonus action, grant an ally within 30 feet temporary HP equal to your proficiency bonus🛡️\nOnce per short rest, steal a spell slot of level 1-3 from a creature who just cast a spell nearby (DC 15 save)🎲

name: Leap or Linger
depiction: A person mid-jump and the same person sitting calmly
effect: As a bonus action, jump up to 30 feet and make a melee attack dealing [[2d8]] damage🦘\nCan spend one minute meditating to regain spell slots equal to your proficiency bonus🧘

name: Push or Pull
depiction: Two hands, one pushing away, one pulling close
effect: As a bonus action, push or pull a creature 15 feet away or toward you, DC [[13]] Strength save to resist🤜\nOnce per short rest, you can teleport 10 feet in any direction as a reaction🏃

name: Bite and Bark
depiction: A wolf’s open jaws and its howling silhouette
effect: As a bonus action, your melee attacks deal an extra [[1d8]] piercing damage this turn🐺\nYou can communicate simple ideas to animals for 10 minutes once per long rest🐾

name: Break or Mend
depiction: A cracked sword and a repaired one shining brightly
effect: As an action, deal [[2d8]] force damage and potentially disarm a weapon\nYou can repair one broken object or nonmagical item instantly🔧

name: Hide and Seek
depiction: Twin shadowy figures blending into a crowd
effect: Become invisible for 1 minute or until you attack or cast a spell🕶️\nYou gain advantage on a single Dexterity (Stealth) check made before your next long rest👀

name: Hide or Seek
depiction: A chameleon blending and a magnifying glass
effect: Become invisible until the start of your next turn or until attacking🕵️\nYou can locate a hidden or invisible creature within 60 feet for 1 minute🔍

name: Sink or Swim
depiction: A sunken ship, and a figure gracefully swimming underwater
effect: Cause an enemy to be restrained and slowed as though underwater for one minute🌊\nBreathe underwater and gain a swimming speed equal to your walking speed for one hour🤿

name: Push and Pull
depiction: Two hands, one pushing forward, one pulling back
effect: Choose a creature within 30 feet: either push it 15 feet away or pull it 15 feet closer🖐️\nOnce per short rest, you can cast Mage Hand without verbal or somatic components🤲

name: Spark or Flame
depiction: A single spark lighting a campfire
effect: Deal [[2d6]] fire damage and ignite your weapon for an extra [[1d6]] fire damage for 1 minute🔥\nYou can create a light source that brightens a 20-foot radius for 1 hour without fuel or illumination spells💡

name: Reap and Sow
depiction: A scythe cutting wheat and a hand planting a seed
effect: Deal [[2d8]] necrotic damage to a target and heal yourself for half the damage dealt🗡️\nYou plant a seed that grows overnight into a useful herb, granting advantage on one medicine check within 24 hours🌱

name: Rip or Repair
depiction: A torn parchment floating alongside a pristine copy
effect: Deal [[2d8]] slashing damage to one target🗡️\nRestore [[1d8+4]] hit points to an ally you touch💚

name: Rip or Stitch
depiction: A torn fabric patching itself
effect: Deal [[2d8]] slashing damage to one target🗡️\nYou or an ally can regain [[2d6]] hit points by magically mending wounds🩹

name: Strike or Shelter
depiction: Two warriors back to back, one sword raised, one shield up
effect: Deal [[2d8+3]] damage to one target within 30 feet🗡️\nGain half cover against all attacks until the start of your next turn🛡️

name: Strike or Mend
depiction: A sword clashing with a shield and a hand bandaging a wound
effect: Deal [[3d4+2]] force damage and push the target 10 feet away🎯\nRestore [[2d6]] hit points to a creature you touch🔆

name: Fire or Ice
depiction: A flame and a snowflake intertwined
effect: Deal [[3d6]] fire damage to a creature and ignite flammable objects within 5 feet🔥\nCreate a 10-foot radius sphere of ice, difficult terrain for 1 minute❄️

name: Reap or Sow
depiction: A scythe cutting wheat and seeds being planted
effect: Deal [[3d6]] necrotic damage and gain temporary hit points equal to half damage dealt🌾\nPlant a magical seed that grows into a healing herb, restoring [[2d8+3]] HP over 10 minutes💚

name: Strike or Shield
depiction: A sword striking forward, a shield raised deflecting
effect: Deal an additional [[1d10+2]] radiant damage with your next melee attack🌟\nGain +2 AC until the start of your next turn🛡️

name: Chill or Burn
depiction: One side shows frost-covered leaves, the other side flaming embers
effect: Deal an additional [[2d6]] cold damage on your next attack🔥\nOnce per day, you can create a campfire that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and can be extinguished instantly❄️

name: Freeze or Flee
depiction: A frozen wolf and a shadowy fox facing opposite directions
effect: Deal cold damage equal to [[2d8]] and reduce movement speed by 10 feet for one minute❄️\nGain advantage on Stealth checks or your next attempt to disengage without provoking opportunity attacks🎭

name: Bark or Bite
depiction: Two wolves, one howling, one baring teeth
effect: Force a target to succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for one minute😨\nCommunicate simple ideas to animals for ten minutes, animals understand and respond accordingly🐺

name: Slip or Grip
depiction: A shadowy hand slipping away and another grasping tightly
effect: Gain advantage on one Dexterity (Stealth) check before the end of your next turn🕵️\nYou can attempt to grapple one creature within reach as a bonus action this turn🤝

name: Risk or Reward
depiction: A coin flipping in midair with a sun and moon on each side
effect: Gain advantage on your next attack but the target gains advantage on their next attack against you🎲\nGain the ability to see invisible creatures for 10 minutes👁️

name: Seek or Destroy
depiction: An eye framed by a crosshair, a sword breaking a shield
effect: Gain advantage on your next attack roll against a creature you’ve seen this turn⚔️\nYou learn the location of a secret door or hidden trap within 30 feet of you if one exists🕵️

name: Risk and Reward
depiction: A gambler tossing dice, one side bright, one shadowed
effect: Gain advantage on your next attack roll, but if it misses, you take [[2d6]] psychic damage🎲\nYou can reroll a skill check or saving throw once within the next hour, but the second roll must be accepted🔮

name: Bite or Bark
depiction: A wolf showing teeth and one howling
effect: Gain advantage on your next melee attack and deal [[1d12+3]] piercing damage🐺\nYou can communicate with nearby animals for one hour, gaining insight from them🐾

name: Bend or Break
depiction: A bent sword beside a snapped blade
effect: Gain resistance to bludgeoning damage for 1 minute🛡️\nYou can attempt to force open or break a lock or barrier with advantage🔨

name: Dive or Soar
depiction: A dolphin leaping from the sea and a hawk in flight
effect: Gain swim speed equal to your walking speed and breathe underwater for 10 minutes🌊\nGain flight speed equal to your walking speed until your next turn🦅

name: Feast or Famine
depiction: Two plates, one overflowing, one empty
effect: Gain temporary hit points equal to [[2d8+4]]🛡️\nYou and one ally can forage successfully, finding enough food for 3 days🍴

name: Feed or Starve
depiction: A cornucopia overflowing and an empty bowl
effect: Heal a creature for [[2d10+4]] hit points with a bite of magical food🍎\nCause a creature to suffer disadvantage on attack rolls for 1 minute due to hunger pangs🥀

name: Give and Take
depiction: Two hands, one offering a flower, the other taking a dagger
effect: Heal an ally for [[2d6 + 3]] hit points as a bonus action💖\nYou can siphon [[1d8]] temporary hit points from a creature you damage once per long rest🩸

name: Spark or Smother
depiction: A candle flame contrasted with a puddle of water
effect: Ignite a target causing [[3d6]] fire damage and ignite flammable objects🔥\nExtinguish one nonmagical flame within 60 feet and silence that area for 1 minute🔇

name: Rush or Rest
depiction: Two figures, one charging forward, the other seated in meditation
effect: Immediately make a melee attack with advantage🗡️\nRegain hit points equal to your level + [[1d8]] once per long rest💤

name: Rush or Wait
depiction: A sprinter dashing forward beside a meditating figure
effect: Immediately move up to your speed without provoking opportunity attacks🏃‍♂️\nGain advantage on your next ability check or saving throw made before the end of your next turn⏳

name: Leap or Bound
depiction: A cat mid-leap, the other coiled ready to spring
effect: Jump up to 30 feet and make a weapon attack as a bonus action🦶\nDouble your jump distance for 10 minutes🦘

name: Trap or Treat
depiction: A bear trap open next to a wrapped gift
effect: Lay a magical trap that triggers on enemy movement causing [[2d8]] piercing damage and restrains for 1 round🪤\nDisguise one mundane item as a sweet treat to calm a hostile creature for 1 minute🍬

name: Hit or Miss
depiction: A target with an arrow hitting the bullseye and another missing
effect: Next attack you make deals an extra [[4d6]] damage if it hits🎯\nGrant advantage on a skill check or saving throw of your choice within 10 minutes🎲

name: Burn or Freeze
depiction: Flames consuming a branch and ice crystals forming on a leaf
effect: On a hit, deal an extra [[3d6]] fire damage and ignite flammable objects 🔥\nYou may freeze a surface to create difficult terrain or extinguish flames in a 20-foot radius ❄️

name: Hold or Release
depiction: A pair of chains, one tightly wound, the other broken
effect: On hit, you can reduce a target’s speed to 0 until your next turn🏃‍♂️\nYou can open any locked or barred door or container as an action without a key🗝️

name: Leap or Lunge
depiction: Two figures poised to move, one jumping forward, one lunging with a spear
effect: On your turn, you can move up to double your speed and make one weapon attack🦵\nYou can jump triple your normal distance without a running start once per hour🤸

name: Twist or Turn
depiction: A winding road splitting in two directions
effect: Once per long rest, reroll a failed saving throw and use the new result♻️\nGain advantage on Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks for 1 hour🌀

name: Speak or Silence
depiction: A mouth open speaking, the other covered by a finger
effect: Once per short rest, force a creature to succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be silenced for one minute🤐\nYou can cast message without components up to 120 feet, ignoring normal range limits💬

name: Tug or Toss
depiction: Two ropes, one tightly pulled the other thrown loose
effect: Pull one creature up to 20 feet closer on a failed Strength save\nThrow an object you’re holding up to 60 feet with advantage on the attack roll🎯

name: Bind or Break
depiction: Chains wrapped around a heart, some glowing red, some shattered
effect: Restrict one creature’s movement with magical chains (DC [[15 + your spellcasting modifier]] Strength save) for 1 minute⛓️\nYou or an ally can break one curse or binding effect of level 3 or lower🗝️

name: Trade or Trick
depiction: Two hands exchanging a glowing coin
effect: Swap a weapon or item with an enemy within 30 feet as a reaction, forcing a contested check💰\nGain advantage on your next Deception or Sleight of Hand check🎭

name: Blink or Stun
depiction: Two eyes, one open wide and one closed tightly
effect: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see and deal [[1d10]] psychic damage to creatures within 5 feet of your departure point🌀\nStun one creature you can see within 10 feet until the start of your next turn😵

name: Blink or Stay
depiction: An eye half-closed and an eye wide open
effect: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see as a reaction teleportation✨\nGain advantage on perception checks for 1 minute👀

name: Rise or Fall
depiction: A pair of birds, one flying, one pierced with an arrow
effect: The next creature you damage within one minute takes an extra [[3d6]] damage🗡️\nThe next time you would take fall damage this hour, you take damage as though you'd fallen 500 feet less🪶

name: Catch or Release
depiction: A net unfurling and a hand letting go
effect: The next time you hit with a weapon attack, you can restrain the target until the end of their next turn (DC 14 Strength check to escape)🕸️\nYou gain advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) or Charisma (Performance) checks for 10 minutes🎭

name: Cut and Run
depiction: A shadowy figure cutting a rope and dashing away
effect: When you hit a creature, reduce their speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn✂️\nYou can teleport up to 30 feet to a space you can see, then you are invisible until the end of your turn👣

name: Lock and Key
depiction: A locked chest with a glowing key floating above it
effect: You can attempt to lock or unlock any non-magical lock within 30 feet as an action, automatic success if you succeed a DC 15 check🔐\nYou unlock one memory or secret from a willing creature, gaining a useful clue or insight once per day🧠

name: Lock or Key
depiction: A key partially in a rusty lock
effect: You can attempt to restrain a creature for 1 minute with a contested check🗝️\nYou can pick or unlock any non-magical lock within 5 minutes🔓

name: Light or Shadow
depiction: A glowing lantern held high and a figure melting into darkness
effect: You can cast *Faerie Fire* centered on yourself without using a spell slot💡\nYou can cast *Darkness* centered on yourself without using a spell slot🌑

name: Wax or Wane
depiction: A moon growing full on one side, shrinking to a sliver on the other
effect: You gain temporary hit points equal to [[1d10+4]] + your Charisma modifier🌙\nYou can dim or brighten a light source up to 60 feet away, shedding bright or dim light as you choose✨

name: Catch and Release
depiction: A fisherman releasing a glowing fish back into water
effect: You may deal an extra [[2d8]] force damage with your next attack🗡️\nYou can calm a hostile creature, giving them advantage on saving throws against fear and charm for 10 minutes🐟

name: Strike or Spare
depiction: A raised sword and an open palm
effect: Your next melee attack deals an extra [[2d6]] damage and knocks the target prone🗡️\nYou can grant an ally within 30 feet a saving throw advantage versus one effect of your choice this minute🛡️

name: Chill or Thrill
depiction: A frosted dagger and a flaming whip
effect: Your next weapon attack deals an additional [[2d6]] cold or fire damage (your choice)❄️🔥\nYou gain advantage on all Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks for 10 minutes🎢
